summary.platform: Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) on Cloudflare CDN
top_findings: /membership/join-aa/ is a decision-stage page delivering brand-story content — no pricing, no tier selector, broken conversion path
Zero schema markup on any page except partial Microdata breadcrumbs (relative URLs, http:// prefix)
All meta descriptions missing site-wide (0 of 29 pages have optimised meta descriptions)
EV charging page references 2022 future event as present fact — factual accuracy failure
/membership/options-and-fees/priceincrease/ is a stale 2023 indexed page appearing in pricing SERPs
Canonical tags are relative not absolute (all 29 pages — single AEM config fix)
quick_wins: Fix AEM Externalizer config to emit absolute canonical + og:image + og:url (1 config change, fixes 29 pages)
Add fetchpriority=high to hero images (1 AEM template change, fixes LCP on all key pages)
Write meta descriptions for 5 highest-traffic pages: /membership/, /roadservice/, /renew/, /standard-membership/, /youth-membership/
Fix EV Christchurch stale claim on /aas-mobile-ev-charging/ (content edit)
Create /llms.txt file (30-60 minutes of dev time)
Rewrite join-aa title from 'Join AA' (7 chars) to 'Join AA New Zealand | Roadside Assistance Membership'

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTPS enforced with 301 redirect; HSTS max-age=63072000 includeSubdomains
No noindex on any of 29 pages
No redirect chains
Clean URL structure: lowercase, hyphens, trailing slashes
Sitemap complete: all 29 pages with ISO 8601 lastmod
robots.txt minimal/appropriate for AEM
Cloudflare CDN for fast TTFB
Responsive srcset images (320w-1600w)

findings.title: Canonical tags are relative not absolute
findings.description: All 29 pages output path-only canonical: <link rel='canonical' href='/membership/'/>. Undefined behaviour for crawlers that process canonicals before resolving base URL.
findings.recommendation: Set AEM Externalizer publish domain to https://www.aa.co.nz in OSGi config. Single change fixes all pages.

findings.title: og:image uses relative paths; social sharing broken
findings.description: og:image outputs root-relative paths. Multiple pages fall back to logo SVG instead of page-relevant imagery.
findings.recommendation: Same Externalizer config fix as canonical. Also audit fallback og:image assignments on join-aa and options-and-fees.

findings.title: og:url absent across all pages
findings.description: Without og:url, UTM-tracked shares fragment social link equity.
findings.recommendation: Add <meta property='og:url'> wired to Externalizer-resolved canonical in AEM template.

findings.title: Title tag critically short on /join-aa/ (7 characters)
findings.description: Title is 'Join AA' — will be rewritten by Google. Page targets highest-intent join query.
findings.recommendation: Change to: 'Join AA New Zealand | Roadside Assistance Membership' (51 chars)

findings.title: Stale priceincrease/ page indexed (2023 event)
findings.description: Page references August 2023 price increase as future event. Meta description stale. Sitemap lastmod 2026-01-21 (template touch).
findings.recommendation: 301 redirect to /membership/options-and-fees/ or add noindex and remove from sitemap.

findings.title: Business roadservice URL duplicates /membership/business/
findings.description: /roadservice/business/ and /membership/business/ both target business fleet roadside — no canonical consolidation.
findings.recommendation: Redirect /roadservice/business/ to /membership/business/aa-business-care/ or tighten topic scoping.

findings.title: og:type and og:locale absent sitewide
findings.description: Platforms default to website/en_US — incorrect for NZ English content.
findings.recommendation: Add og:type=website and og:locale=en_NZ to AEM base page template.

findings.title: All hero images lazy-loaded — LCP risk
findings.description: Every carries loading=lazy with no fetchpriority exception for above-fold images.
findings.recommendation: Add loading=eager + fetchpriority=high to first above-fold image per page via AEM Image component.

findings.title: No Twitter Card meta tags
findings.description: No twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description on any page.
findings.recommendation: Add twitter:card=summary_large_image and twitter:site=@AAnewzealand to AEM template.

findings.title: CSP: unsafe-inline + unsafe-eval in script-src
findings.description: Adobe Launch/DTM requires unsafe-inline, effectively neutralising XSS protection. No Referrer-Policy or Permissions-Policy headers.
findings.recommendation: Add Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin and Permissions-Policy header via Cloudflare Workers.

findings.title: IndexNow not detected
findings.description: No IndexNow key file or meta tag. Cloudflare integration not confirmed active.
findings.recommendation: Enable Cloudflare built-in IndexNow or deploy indexnow_submit.py for faster re-indexing of pricing updates.

categories.name: Content Quality (E-E-A-T)
what_works: Pricing transparent with Auckland vs Rest of NZ split
Full loyalty discount table (Year 1-50+)
AA Plus benefit caps explicitly documented ($800/event, $1,500/year)
Roadside join pricing disclosed ($209 or $159)
45+ member benefits with specific discount percentages
Consistent contact numbers across all pages

findings.title: EV Christchurch stale claim — factual accuracy failure
findings.description: /aas-mobile-ev-charging/ states 'A fourth van will be introduced to Christchurch later in 2022' — 4 years old. /join-aa/ still says 'coming soon to Christchurch'. Will be cited incorrectly by AI systems.
findings.recommendation: Update /aas-mobile-ev-charging/ to reflect actual current status. If Christchurch launched, confirm it. If not, remove the forward-looking claim.

findings.title: Zero member testimonials or social proof
findings.description: No member quotes, star ratings, or review excerpts across 13 audited pages. 'Award-winning' H1 claim relies only on an image asset — not crawlable as text.
findings.recommendation: Add 2-3 real member quotes to /join-aa/ and /membership/ hub. Name the Reader's Digest award explicitly: 'Winner, Reader's Digest Most Trusted Brand 2026 [category]'.

findings.title: Thin content on 5 key pages
findings.description: /business/ ~115 words, /associate-membership/ ~233, /join-aa/ ~224, /youth-membership/ ~293, /renew/ ~285. All below 500-word minimum for service pages.
findings.recommendation: Rebuild each to 600+ words with eligibility scenarios, worked examples, FAQs, and tier-specific benefit summaries.

findings.title: Near-duplicate content across Standard, Associate, Youth tier pages
findings.description: Identical 'benefits', 'covers you not the vehicle', AA Plus upsell, and comparison table blocks across all three tier pages. Unique content: one price + 1-2 eligibility sentences per page.
findings.recommendation: Replace boilerplate with tier-specific content: eligibility FAQ, typical use cases, and unique value statements for each tier.

findings.title: No FAQ content on any membership page
findings.description: No FAQ sections across 13 pages. Unaddressed: callout limits, cancellation, lapse recovery, EV coverage, overseas cover. High-volume AI overview trigger queries.
findings.recommendation: Build FAQ sections on /join-aa/, /renew/, and /roadservice/. Minimum 6 questions each. Add FAQPage JSON-LD schema.

findings.title: No publication or last-reviewed dates on any page
findings.description: Zero freshness dating across entire section. Competitor review sites show explicit 2024/2025 dates, giving them freshness advantage for consideration queries.
findings.recommendation: Add 'Last updated: [date]' to pages with time-sensitive content (pricing, EV availability, benefits).

findings.title: Benefits disclaimer buried; no verification dates
findings.description: 'Member Benefits are subject to change without notification' appears only as small text at page bottom. No last-verified date on any of 45+ benefits.
findings.recommendation: Make disclaimer more prominent. Add last-verified date per benefit category.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Hub, roadservice, aa-plus, and gift pages have good title tags (50-62 chars with brand/keyword)
URL structure clean throughout
Most H1s descriptive (exceptions noted)
Internal navigation links most key pages from global megamenu

findings.title: Meta descriptions missing on majority of pages
findings.description: 0 of 29 pages have optimised meta descriptions. Several have none at all; others are too short (55-69 chars) or seasonally stale ('This summer...').
findings.recommendation: Write 120-155 char evergreen descriptions with pricing hooks for all 29 pages. Priority: /membership/, /roadservice/, /renew/, /standard-membership/, /youth-membership/.

findings.title: H1 on join page is brand slogan, not keyword-bearing
findings.description: /membership/join-aa/ H1: 'We've got you.' — marketing tagline, zero keyword signal on highest-intent conversion page.
findings.recommendation: Change to 'Join AA – NZ's Largest Motoring Association' or similar. Move tagline to subheading.

findings.title: Title tags critically short on 5 utility pages
findings.description: join-aa (7 chars), renew (24), cardreplacement (16), new-card-faqs (29), priceincrease (25 + stale).
findings.recommendation: See technical audit for specific replacement titles.

findings.title: Bikes/scooters page has duplicate title of parent
findings.description: /roadservice/bikes-and-scooters/ title: 'AA Roadservice – NZ Roadside and Breakdown Assistance' — identical to parent /roadservice/ page.
findings.recommendation: Change to: 'AA Roadservice for Bikes, E-bikes and E-scooters | AA New Zealand'

findings.title: No B2B conversion path from /membership/ hub
findings.description: /membership/business/ is invisible from the consumer hub. Business persona scores 29/100. No fleet-coverage module in hub navigation.
findings.recommendation: Add 'Covering a business or fleet?' module below personal tier cards with link to /membership/business/.

findings.title: Benefits page primary CTA is Login, not Join
findings.description: Above fold on /benefits-and-discounts/ shows Login CTA as primary action. Non-members have no conversion path from this consideration-stage page.
findings.recommendation: Add sticky 'Join from $89' bar + per-category inline CTAs after each benefit group.

findings.title: Tier pages don't cross-link horizontally
findings.description: A user on /aa-plus/ who finds it too expensive has no path to /standard/. No 'compare all tiers' link on individual tier pages.
findings.recommendation: Add 'Compare all membership types' accordion or comparison table to each individual tier page.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Microdata BreadcrumbList present on all 10 audited pages
Microdata ImageObject wrapping promotional images

findings.title: No Organization schema anywhere
findings.description: Zero entity markup. Google cannot confirm AA's name, URL, logo, contacts, or sameAs links from this page set.
findings.recommendation: Implement Organization JSON-LD in AEM global head template. See schema.md for full code.

findings.title: No Product + Offer schema on membership tier pages
findings.description: 4 purchasable tiers with explicit prices — none exposed via schema. Direct loss of price rich results and AI overview pricing citations.
findings.recommendation: Add Product + Offer + PriceSpecification JSON-LD to each tier page. See schema.md for full code.

findings.title: BreadcrumbList uses http:// not https://
findings.description: All itemtype declarations use deprecated http://schema.org. Current standard requires https://schema.org.
findings.recommendation: Fix AEM BreadcrumbList component template to use https:// prefix.

findings.title: BreadcrumbList item hrefs are relative not absolute
findings.description: All itemprop=item anchors use root-relative paths. Spec requires absolute URLs.
findings.recommendation: Fix AEM component to prepend https://www.aa.co.nz to all breadcrumb hrefs.

findings.title: Current page absent from breadcrumb trail on all tier pages
findings.description: Deepest page never included as final breadcrumb item on standard, youth, associate, aa-plus pages.
findings.recommendation: Add active page as final ListItem to AEM BreadcrumbList component.

findings.title: No Service schema on roadservice page
findings.description: Primary acquisition page for breakdown queries has no Service markup.
findings.recommendation: Add Service JSON-LD with serviceType, provider, areaServed, hoursAvailable. See schema.md for full code.

findings.title: No FAQPage schema anywhere in section
findings.description: Despite accordion FAQ content existing on /new-card-faqs/, no FAQPage schema on any page. GEO/AI citation impact.
findings.recommendation: Add FAQPage schema to all pages with Q&A content once FAQ sections are built.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
categories.note: PSI API quota exhausted. Scores are source-pattern estimates.
what_works: AEM on Cloudflare CDN — good TTFB expected
Responsive srcset images (320w-1600w)
CLS likely passing — no major layout shift patterns detected in source

findings.title: All images lazy-loaded including LCP candidates
findings.description: Every carries loading=lazy. No fetchpriority=high on any image. Hero on /membership/ is 1563x1458px JPEG loaded lazily. Estimated LCP: 3.0-4.5s (poor threshold).
findings.recommendation: Add loading=eager + fetchpriority=high to above-fold hero per page. AEM Image core component supports fetchpriority parameter.

findings.title: No resource hints for critical assets
findings.description: No <link rel=preload> for hero images. No <link rel=preconnect> for Adobe DTM endpoints.
findings.recommendation: Add preload hint for LCP image in <head>. Add preconnect for assets.adobedtm.com.

findings.title: Hero images served as JPEG not WebP/AVIF
findings.description: Hero images are full-size JPEGs. WebP/AVIF would reduce file size 25-35%.
findings.recommendation: Enable Cloudflare Images or AEM Dynamic Media to serve WebP with JPEG fallback via <picture> element.

findings.title: Adobe Launch/DTM render-blocking potential
findings.description: assets.adobedtm.com script may block rendering if not deferred. Needs verification.
findings.recommendation: Confirm Adobe Launch loads async/defer. Audit Total Blocking Time via real PSI run with API key.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: All AI crawlers permitted (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot allowed)
Server-side rendering confirmed — content visible pre-JS
Strong brand authority: 120+ years, Wikipedia entity, FIA membership
Specific pricing data present and partially citable
Loyalty discount table highly structured and extractable

findings.title: 404 errors on key sub-pages linked internally
findings.description: /roadservice/what-we-cover/, /options-and-fees/standard/, /options-and-fees/youth/, /roadservice/callouts/ return 404. AI crawlers follow internal links, hit 404s, cannot index these pages.
findings.recommendation: Audit all /membership/ internal links for 404s. Fix redirects or restore content. /what-we-cover/ is highest priority.

findings.title: No llms.txt file
findings.description: https://www.aa.co.nz/llms.txt returns 404. No machine-readable content manifest for AI crawlers.
findings.recommendation: Create /llms.txt with title, description, contact, and list of 5-10 authoritative membership URLs. 30-60 minutes dev time.

findings.title: No general membership FAQ page
findings.description: Only FAQ page is about discontinued Smartfuel card. No answers to: callout limits, cancellation, lapse, EV cover, overseas cover.
findings.recommendation: Create /membership/faq/ with 15-20 Q&A pairs + FAQPage JSON-LD schema.

findings.title: Pricing not in structured extractable format
findings.description: Prices in promotional copy, not in labelled HTML tables. Auckland/Rest of NZ split lacks geographic qualifier in first 60 words.
findings.recommendation: Implement <table> with <thead> column labels on /options-and-fees/. Add PriceSpecification JSON-LD.

findings.title: Key facts fragmented across pages
findings.description: 'Covers you, not the vehicle' and 24-hour stand-down period appear on /join-aa/, not on /roadservice/ or /options-and-fees/ where users ask these questions.
findings.recommendation: Add self-contained explanation blocks (under 150 words) on roadservice and options-and-fees pages.

categories.name: Images
what_works: Responsive srcset present (320w-1600w AEM-generated)
Images wrapped in ImageObject microdata

findings.title: Several pages fall back to logo SVG for og:image
findings.description: /join-aa/ and /options-and-fees/ use logo SVG as og:image rather than page-relevant imagery. Poor social sharing preview.
findings.recommendation: Assign contextually appropriate og:image assets in AEM page properties for key pages.

findings.title: Hero images not served in WebP/AVIF
findings.description: Large JPEGs without next-gen format delivery.
findings.recommendation: Enable Cloudflare Images or AEM Dynamic Media for WebP delivery.

findings.title: ImageObject contentUrl uses relative paths
findings.description: Schema.org spec requires absolute URLs for contentUrl.
findings.recommendation: Same AEM Externalizer fix as canonical tags will resolve this.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Fix AEM Externalizer config: absolute canonical + og:image + og:url (1 config change, 29 pages fixed)
Fix EV Christchurch stale claim on /aas-mobile-ev-charging/ (factual accuracy failure)
301 redirect /membership/options-and-fees/priceincrease/ to /membership/options-and-fees/
Rewrite join-aa title tag from 'Join AA' (7 chars) to full keyword-bearing title
Rewrite join-aa H1 from 'We've got you.' to 'Join AA – NZ's Largest Motoring Association'
Fix og:type=website and og:locale=en_NZ in AEM base template
Audit all /membership/ internal links for 404s (fix /what-we-cover/, /standard/, /youth/, /callouts/)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Write meta descriptions for all 29 pages (priority: hub, roadservice, renew, standard, youth)
Add fetchpriority=high + loading=eager to above-fold hero images (AEM template change)
Implement Organization JSON-LD in AEM global head template
Implement Product + Offer JSON-LD on all 4 membership tier pages
Implement Service JSON-LD on /roadservice-breakdown-assistance/
Fix BreadcrumbList microdata: https:// prefix, absolute hrefs, add current page as final item
Create /llms.txt file with content manifest
Rebuild /join-aa/ as conversion landing page (inline pricing, tier selector, emergency join path)
Fix /renew/ page: show pricing, add 1-click renewal CTA, reframe loyalty message

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Create /membership/faq/ page with 15-20 Q&A pairs + FAQPage JSON-LD
Create /membership/is-aa-membership-worth-it/ consideration-stage page (value calculator, comparison, testimonials)
Add FAQ sections to /join-aa/, /renew/, and /roadservice/ (6+ questions each)
Rebuild thin pages: /associate-membership/, /youth-membership/, /business/ to 600+ words
Add member testimonials to /join-aa/ and /membership/ hub
Add conversion CTAs to /benefits-and-discounts/ (sticky bar + per-category inline CTAs)
Add 'Covering a business or fleet?' module to /membership/ hub
Cross-link tier pages horizontally with comparison table/accordion
Add attribute Reader's Digest award in crawlable body text

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Run real PageSpeed Insights with API key to confirm CWV field data
Enable WebP/AVIF image delivery via Cloudflare or AEM Dynamic Media
Add preconnect for assets.adobedtm.com, preload for LCP images
Add Referrer-Policy and Permissions-Policy headers via Cloudflare Workers
Enable IndexNow via Cloudflare integration
Add last-reviewed dates to pages with time-sensitive content
Set up drift baseline monitoring for /membership/ key pages
Monitor SERP position for 'AA membership worth it NZ' after new page creation
